grant_ready_identity.organisation: R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd
grant_ready_identity.compliance_note: Companies House public readback on 2026-07-05 shows active status but a confirmation statement overdue warning. Resolve or manage before competitive submissions.

core_grant_thesis: Aureon is a local-first evidence operating system and research automation environment for high-risk AI workflows, reproducible scientific discovery, SME back-office automation, warehouse/productivity automation, and validation-led research communications.

high_priority_packages.title: Aureon Evidence OS for Safe Local AI Operations
best_routes: Invest NI Innovation Funding Advisory Service
Next Wave only if Createch fit is confirmed
high_priority_packages.plain_description: A local-first AI workflow and evidence runtime for controlled, auditable operation of high-risk business and research processes.

high_priority_packages.title: HNC Coherence Framework for AI-Driven Scientific Discovery
best_routes: future UKRI via eligible host partner
high_priority_packages.plain_description: A hypothesis-driven software and research framework for coherence scoring, signal processing, evidence routing, and reproducible AI workflows.

high_priority_packages.title: AI-Assisted SME Compliance and Evidence Pack Automation
high_priority_packages.plain_description: A back-office automation route for accounting evidence, compliance support, filing preparation, and auditable SME workflows.

high_priority_packages.title: Warehouse Location and Stock Evidence Automation
high_priority_packages.plain_description: A warehouse automation route for stock/location proof, OCR review, batch ledgers, hold reasons, and operator-visible audit trails.

high_priority_packages.title: Feasibility Study for Harmonic Remote Sensing and Signal-Processing Concepts
best_routes: AIRR if narrowed to AI-driven discovery
DASA/UK Space Agency only after partner scoping
high_priority_packages.plain_description: Early-stage simulation and proof-of-principle research for remote sensing, signal processing, materials/energy concepts, and space/defence-adjacent sensing.

safe_to_state_directly: Company registration facts verified from Companies House
Public GitHub organisation and repository existence
Local and Drive archive preservation with readback
Existence of local research corpus and Drive evidence packs
state_with_caveats: ResearchGate, Academia, and ORCID as public profile/dissemination sources
HNC, EPAS, Druid, LIDAR, Atlantic Substrate, Sagittarius, Doorbell, and Walgidee as research outputs or hypotheses
Backtests, numerical matches, and empirical audit claims pending independent review
do_not_use: Guaranteed returns or 100 percent success claims
Energy extraction, defence shielding, or sensing capability stated as proven
Reality engineering as literal product language
Bank statements, account records, raw ledgers, or tax records without exact Gary approval
